final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: packaging design showcase, commercial product photography
Primary request: complete packaging design display for a premium organic matcha product line with four products arranged on a light wood surface
Scene/backdrop: light wooden tabletop, scattered fresh tea leaves and matcha powder as decorative accents, clean studio setting
Subject: four matcha products — matcha powder tin, matcha chocolate box, matcha cookie tin, matcha tea bag box — arranged in a neat composition
Style/medium: commercial product photography merged with design rendering, premium packaging mockup
Composition/framing: top-down three-quarter angle, medium shot showing all four products clearly, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, bright and airy atmosphere, elegant and refined mood
Color palette: various shades of matcha green as primary, off-white and gold accents, natural wood tones
Materials/textures: matte paper packaging with subtle traditional Japanese pattern as background texture, delicate hand-drawn matcha tea garden illustration with elegant clean lines on each package
Text (verbatim): "产品名称采用中英日三语排版"
Typography: serif typeface combined with handwritten script for trilingual text (Chinese/English/Japanese)
Constraints: maintain Japanese minimalist aesthetic fused with modern design sensibility, preserve the elegant Eastern aesthetic suitable for premium gift market positioning
Avoid: glossy plastic textures, cluttered composition, neon colors, cartoonish illustrations, low-quality stock photography look
